task_name: Validate Sathar retreat-condition selection (pass-2 remediation: bounded re-prompt loop)
validation_outcome: PASS - clean repo-root build (exit 0); SSWTests reports OK (230 tests) with cwd=tests/, no failures and no NEW failures (FGameHeaderDependencyTest did not fail). The new bounded-cap-exhaustion test asserts init() terminates, selectRetreatCondition() is called exactly 1000 times, and showRetreatConditions() dispatches the 'Error: No retreat condition selected' default branch (never a valid 1..5 condition text), proving m_satharRetreat is left at its unset/default value. The 3 pass-1 tests are unchanged and green.
notes: history/pass-1/ under this directory was left untouched. No new mock class was needed; the existing ScriptedRetreatConditionMockStrategicUI replays its last scripted value once exhausted, so a single-element invalid sequence (-1 ~ wxID_CANCEL) yields always-invalid behavior. All assertions are behavioral; no source-string inspection substitutes for runtime verification.
